texts.content: {"styles":[{"fill":{"alpha":1,"content":{"render_type":"solid","solid":{"alpha":1,"color":[1,1,1]}}},"range":[0,13],"size":5.8667,"bold":true,"italic":false,"underline":false,"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"alpha":1,"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.08}]}],"text":"顺手把老东家的业务也接了。"}

{"styles":[{"fill":{"alpha":1,"content":{"render_type":"solid","solid":{"alpha":1,"color":[1,0.8313725490196079,0.14901960784313725]}}},"range":[0,13],"size":10.6667,"bold":true,"italic":false,"underline":false,"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"alpha":1,"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.09}]}],"text":"做大做强，原有业务全被包了"}

{"styles":[{"fill":{"alpha":1,"content":{"render_type":"solid","solid":{"alpha":1,"color":[1,0.8313725490196079,0.14901960784313725]}}},"range":[0,13],"size":10.9333,"bold":true,"italic":false,"underline":false,"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"alpha":1,"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.09}]}],"text":"原老板破产，气得当场昏过去"}

{"styles":[{"fill":{"alpha":1,"content":{"render_type":"solid","solid":{"alpha":1,"color":[1,1,1]}}},"range":[0,14],"size":6.1333,"bold":true,"italic":false,"underline":false,"strokes":[{"content":{"solid":{"alpha":1,"color":[0,0,0]}},"width":0.08}]}],"text":"维权做成事业，钱一摞一摞来。"}
